mapper.select: select m.mapping_id as MAPPING_ID, m.period_id as PERIOD_ID, m.evaluatee_id as EVALUATEE_ID, m.evaluator_id as EVALUATOR_ID, m.relation_type_code as RELATION_TYPE_CODE, e1.name as EVALUATEE_NAME, e2.name as EVALUATOR_NAME, m.is_deleted as IS_DELETED, m.version as VERSION, m.created_at as CREATED_AT, m.created_by as CREATED_BY, m.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, m.updated_by as UPDATED_BY from evaluator_mappings_51 m inner join employees_51 e1 on m.evaluatee_id = e1.emp_id inner join employees_51 e2 on m.evaluator_id = e2.emp_id where m.mapping_id = #{mappingId} and m.is_deleted = 'n'

select m.mapping_id as MAPPING_ID, m.period_id as PERIOD_ID, m.evaluatee_id as EVALUATEE_ID, m.evaluator_id as EVALUATOR_ID, m.relation_type_code as RELATION_TYPE_CODE, e1.name as EVALUATEE_NAME, e2.name as EVALUATOR_NAME, m.is_deleted as IS_DELETED, m.version as VERSION, m.created_at as CREATED_AT, m.created_by as CREATED_BY, m.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, m.updated_by as UPDATED_BY from evaluator_mappings_51 m inner join employees_51 e1 on m.evaluatee_id = e1.emp_id inner join employees_51 e2 on m.evaluator_id = e2.emp_id where m.period_id = #{periodId} and m.is_deleted = 'n'
and e1.dept_id = #{deptId} and e1.is_deleted = 'n'
order by m.evaluatee_id asc, m.relation_type_code asc

select m.mapping_id as MAPPING_ID, m.period_id as PERIOD_ID, m.evaluatee_id as EVALUATEE_ID, m.evaluator_id as EVALUATOR_ID, m.relation_type_code as RELATION_TYPE_CODE, e1.name as EVALUATEE_NAME, e2.name as EVALUATOR_NAME, m.is_deleted as IS_DELETED, m.version as VERSION, m.created_at as CREATED_AT, m.created_by as CREATED_BY, m.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, m.updated_by as UPDATED_BY from evaluator_mappings_51 m inner join employees_51 e1 on m.evaluatee_id = e1.emp_id inner join employees_51 e2 on m.evaluator_id = e2.emp_id where m.period_id = #{periodId} and m.evaluator_id = #{evaluatorId} and m.is_deleted = 'n' order by m.relation_type_code asc, m.evaluatee_id asc

select m.mapping_id as MAPPING_ID, m.period_id as PERIOD_ID, m.evaluatee_id as EVALUATEE_ID, m.evaluator_id as EVALUATOR_ID, m.relation_type_code as RELATION_TYPE_CODE, e1.name as EVALUATEE_NAME, e2.name as EVALUATOR_NAME, m.is_deleted as IS_DELETED, m.version as VERSION, m.created_at as CREATED_AT, m.created_by as CREATED_BY, m.updated_at as UPDATED_AT, m.updated_by as UPDATED_BY from evaluator_mappings_51 m inner join employees_51 e1 on m.evaluatee_id = e1.emp_id inner join employees_51 e2 on m.evaluator_id = e2.emp_id where m.period_id = #{periodId} and m.evaluatee_id = #{evaluateeId} and m.is_deleted = 'n' order by m.relation_type_code asc, m.evaluator_id asc
mapper.delete: update evaluator_mappings_51 set is_deleted = 'y', updated_at = getDate(), updated_by = 1000 where period_id = #{periodId} and relation_type_code = 'SELF' and is_deleted = 'n'
